title: Special Variables - Remaining
description: Implement remaining special variables: $_ (last argument of previous command), $- (current shell flags - requires shell options), $LINENO (current line number - requires script execution context).

title: Essential Builtins - Part 2 (exec, readonly)
description: Implement second batch of essential shell builtins: exec (replace shell with command, handle redirections), readonly (mark variables as read-only, prevent modification).

title: Expand Test Coverage
description: Add more integration tests for edge cases, implement unit tests for all components.

title: Handle subshells and command groups in pipelines
description: Currently subshells ( ) and command groups { } are not supported within pipelines. Need to add special handling for these in the pipeline execution code. See command.go:396.

title: Shell Arrays
description: Implement shell arrays (not replaced by M28): indexed arrays arr=(one two three), array access ${arr[0]}, ${arr[@]}, ${arr[*]}, array slicing ${arr[@]:1:2}, array length ${#arr[@]}, array assignment arr[5]=value, associative arrays (declare -A map).

title: Advanced Tilde Expansion
description: Implement advanced tilde expansion: ~user (home directory of user), ~+ (current working directory PWD), ~- (previous working directory OLDPWD).

title: Shell Functions (Native)
description: Add support for user-defined native shell functions (not just M28): function arguments and return values, return command, local for function-local variables, function autoloading.

title: Resource and Process Management
description: Implement resource and process management builtins: ulimit (set/display resource limits), umask (set/display file creation mask), times (display process times), wait (with job specs), disown (remove jobs from job table), suspend (suspend the shell).

title: Arithmetic Expansion
description: Implement arithmetic expansion $((expression)): basic arithmetic (+, -, *, /, %, **), bitwise operators (&, |, ^, ~, <<, >>), comparison (==, !=, <, >, <=, >=), logical (&&, ||, !), ternary (condition ? true_val : false_val), assignment operators (=, +=, -=, etc.), pre/post increment/decrement (++, --), let command, (( )) for arithmetic evaluation.

title: Command Introspection - Complete Implementation
description: Complete command introspection features: builtin (force builtin execution), command (execute bypassing functions/aliases - execution mode), hash (manage command hash table), enable/disable (shell builtins).

title: Record Streams with M28 Integration
description: Transform gosh into a data-oriented shell by implementing record streams. This is the major initiative that differentiates gosh from other shells.

title: Record Streams Phase 1 - Core Infrastructure
description: Core Record Infrastructure: Define record types and serialization format, implement RecordEmitter and RecordConsumer interfaces, add --records flag to built-in commands (ls, ps, etc.). Basic I/O commands: from-json, from-csv, to-json, to-table. Pipeline integration: modify pipeline executor to handle record streams, add record-aware pipe operator, environment variable for format negotiation.

title: M28 Lisp/Shell Interop
description: Improve Lisp/Shell interop: seamless type conversion between shell and Lisp, Lisp functions callable as shell commands, shell commands callable from Lisp, shared variable namespace.

title: Read Command - Array Support
description: Add read -a array for reading into array variables (pending array support implementation).

title: Shell Documentation
description: Add comprehensive documentation for all features, create man pages for the shell and its builtins.

title: Directory Navigation Enhancements
description: Auto-cd (type directory name to cd), named directories (hash -d), smart cd with fuzzy matching, cd - history (not just previous dir).

title: Command Line Editing
description: Enhanced line editing capabilities: Emacs/vi editing modes, vi/emacs keybindings, custom widgets and key bindings, multi-line editing with proper cursor movement, kill ring (clipboard history), undo/redo, visual selection mode, incremental search, transpose words/characters.

title: Extended Test Command ([[)
description: Implement [[ command (bash extended test with pattern matching). Features: pattern matching with =~ for regex, glob pattern matching with ==, different quoting rules from [.

title: Shell Options and Debugging
description: Implement shell options: set -e (errexit), set -u (nounset), set -o pipefail, set -x (xtrace), set +o option to disable, set - to reset positional parameters, shopt for bash-specific options.

title: Configuration System (.goshrc)
description: Add support for config file (M28-based .goshrc): config-set for settings, define-alias/define-abbrev, bind-key for key bindings, add-hook for event handlers (precmd, chpwd, etc.), set-option for shell options, add-syntax-rule, add-completer. Support system-wide /etc/goshrc, login vs non-login shell distinction, interactive vs non-interactive detection.

title: Performance Optimization
description: Profile and optimize command execution, reduce memory usage for long-running sessions.

title: M28 Standard Library for Shell
description: Create ~/.m28/gosh/ standard library modules: concurrent.m28 (async patterns, parallel_map, timeout, race), result.m28 (CommandResult class, Result type), resilience.m28 (retry, fallback, circuit_breaker), pipeline.m28 (error-aware pipelines).

title: History Features
description: History expansion: !! (last command), !$ (last arg), !^ (first arg), !pattern (last matching), ^old^new (replace). Shared history between sessions, history timestamps, HISTCONTROL options (ignoredups, ignorespace), Ctrl+R reverse history search.

title: Gosh-Specific M28 Builtins
description: Add shell execution functions to M28: shell (run command, return stdout), shell_result (return CommandResult with exit code, stdout, stderr), shell_async (run asynchronously, return Task), shell_pipeline (multi-command pipeline), access to shell environment and job control from M28.

title: Essential Builtins - Part 3 (trap, return, local, declare)
description: Implement third batch of essential shell builtins: trap (set signal handlers), return (exit from function/sourced script), local (function-local variables), and declare/typeset (declare variables with attributes).

title: Select Command for Interactive Menus
description: Implement select command for interactive menus (user interaction).

title: Essential Builtins - Part 1 (source, eval, unset, colon)
description: Implement first batch of essential shell builtins: source/. (source script files), eval (evaluate string as command), unset (remove environment variables), and : (null command that always succeeds).

title: Essential Builtins
description: Implement essential shell builtins: source/., eval, trap, exec, return, unset, readonly, local, declare/typeset, : (null command).

title: Signal Handling Improvements
description: Improve handling of various signals (SIGINT, SIGTSTP, etc.) and add custom signal handlers for better shell control.

title: Recursive Globbing
description: Implement recursive globbing **/*.js for searching all subdirectories. This is essential for modern development workflows.

title: Prompt Customization
description: More variables and expansion options for prompts: support for ANSI colors and styling, PS1/PS2/PS3/PS4 variables, PROMPT_COMMAND for dynamic prompts, RPROMPT (right-side prompt support).

title: Record Streams Phase 3 - Advanced Features
description: Field Operations: nested field access with / notation, array indexing with # notation, fuzzy field matching with @ prefix, wildcard field selection. Aggregation Commands: group-by, aggregate (sum, avg, count), window (time or count-based), pivot. Data Commands: where (SQL-like filtering), select (project fields), join (multiple streams), sort-by (multi-field).

title: Parameter Expansion
description: Implement parameter expansion: ${var:-default}, ${var:=value}, ${var:?error}, ${var:+alternate}, substring removal (${var#pattern}, ${var##pattern}, ${var%pattern}, ${var%%pattern}), pattern substitution (${var/pattern/replacement}), case modification (${var^}, ${var^^}, ${var,}, ${var,,}), length ${#var}, substring ${var:offset:length}.

title: M28 Stream Processing Library
description: Create M28 stream processing library: lazy evaluation for infinite streams, parallel processing primitives, stream combinators (merge, zip, partition), window and session functions.

title: M28 Record-Oriented Lisp Functions
description: Extend M28 with record manipulation functions: get-field, set-field, update, collection operations (map, filter, reduce, group-by), statistical functions (sum, average, percentile), time/date functions for temporal data.

title: Process Substitution
description: Implement process substitution: <(command) and >(command) to allow using command output as file input without temporary files.

title: Interactive Shell Features
description: Fish-style interactive features: syntax highlighting while typing (immediate visual feedback), auto-suggestions based on history (grayed-out completions), command correction (Did you mean...?), abbreviations (expand in-place, better than aliases), helpful error messages (user-friendly, actionable), universal variables (persist across sessions).

title: Advanced Job Control
description: Implement advanced job control: job specs syntax (%1, %+, %-, %job_name), wait with specific job specs, disown to detach jobs from shell, job change notifications, proper SIGCHLD handling.

title: Advanced Glob Qualifiers
description: Zsh-style glob qualifiers: negation patterns ^*.txt, exclusion *~*.bak, type qualifiers *(.) files only, *(/) dirs only, time-based *(m-7) modified in last week, size qualifiers *(Lm+100), permission qualifiers *(f755), sorting qualifiers *(om) order by modification.

title: Better Error Messages
description: Improve error reporting with more context, add suggestions for common errors (fish-style user-friendly, actionable feedback).

title: Tab Completion Enhancements
description: Expand tab completion: handle more complex scenarios, completion for command options/flags, complete command for programmable completion, compgen for completion generation, context-aware completions (git branches, hostnames, etc.), completion descriptions (fish-style), remote file completion (scp, ssh), variable name completion.

title: Record Streams Phase 2 - M28 Stream Processing
description: Lisp Stream Operators: (map), (filter), (reduce), (take)/(drop). Inline Lisp Integration: parse inline Lisp expressions in pipelines, $ variable for current record access, seamless conversion between shell and Lisp. Stream Comprehensions: (defstream), stream composition operators, lazy evaluation support.

title: Brace Expansion Sequences
description: Implement brace expansion sequences: numeric sequences {1..10}, {10..1}, zero-padded {01..10}, character sequences {a..z}, {A..Z}, step values {0..100..5}, nested braces {a,b{1,2}}.

title: M28 Performance and Debugging
description: M28 performance and debugging improvements: JIT compilation for hot code paths, stream processing optimizations, visual debugger for Lisp pipelines, performance profiling tools.

title: Record Streams Phase 4 - Ecosystem
description: Format Support: from-yaml/to-yaml, from-xml/to-xml, from-log with pattern matching, auto-detect format. External Integration: http command for API calls, to-sqlite/from-sqlite, to-chart for visualizations, plugin system for custom formats.
